title: SN2 2DJ, Thames Water Utilities Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/BP3590SR/C002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Thames Water Utilities Limited   Installation name: Swindon Sludge Treatment Centre   Permit number: EPR/BP3590SR/C002   "
